completed_acs.ac: Save button should disable all fields.
completed_acs.summary: Introduced per-party lockedPartyIndices state in offer store. After saving in Proposal phase, all fields become read-only via updatePartyReadonlyFields() in Third.vue.
The existing Modify button in Offer.vue now unlocks all parties (unlockParty) via handleUnlockPartyTab, allowing fields to become editable again.

completed_acs.ac: Save button should lock all fields again.
completed_acs.summary: After clicking Save again, dirty parties are re-locked (lockParty) both in Third.vue individual save and Offer.vue global save.
